tasks.label: Move items except .git and target folder
tasks.command: cd c:\Users\malay\Desktop\AI_2X_Blueprint\Project_MCP_Playwright; Remove-Item PROJECT_MCP_PLAYWRIGHT -Recurse -Force; mkdir PROJECT_MCP_PLAYWRIGHT; Get-ChildItem -Force | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne '.git' -and $_.Name -ne 'PROJECT_MCP_PLAYWRIGHT' } | ForEach-Object { Move-Item $_.FullName -Destination .\PROJECT_MCP_PLAYWRIGHT }
